body_txt: A threat intended to make someone sexually uncomfortable. A character may (sometimes subtly) issue a threat to go further than a Groin Attack , a threat to mutilate or sever another's most sensitive parts. Usually they imply cutting off a male character's penis or tearing off his testicles to castrate him. They usually have no intention of enacting the threat, which can therefore be Played For Black Comedy . Compare Cut His Heart Out with a Spoon and I Will Tear Your Arms Off , threats so grotesquely over-the-top they are rather silly. Just making the character think about castration (and likely cringe in imagined pain ) is enough of an Instant Turn-Off to put their libido on ice. A character may give this threat when they consider the other's sexuality itself a problem — compare Boyfriend-Blocking Dad , My Sister Is Off-Limits , Pervert Revenge Mode . The Casanova or any would-be Adulterer are frequent targets. If they actually intend to carry it out, compare Crippling Castration and Psychosexual Horror . See also Rape and Revenge , a possible motive for gruesome retribution. See also Phallic Weapon , when it's the weapon itself that has Freudian overtones.
